name: Nike Volleyball Camp at Arizona Athletic Grounds - Setting Clinic OR Hitting Clinic (June 1, 2026)
description: Join us this summer at Arizona Athletic Grounds in Mesa for fun and learning on the court! Campers of all abilities will train with an elite coaching staff using a curriculum designed by James Finley, former Head Volleyball Coach at Seattle University. Open to girls and boys, ages 5-18, this volleyball camp is geared toward building confidence, improving skills, and making new friends. From fun drills to friendly games, every moment is designed to help you enjoy the sport you love. Don’t miss out in Arizona—sign up today!

name: Nike Volleyball Camp at Emmanuel College -  (June 29–July 2, 2026)
description: Get ready for our volleyball camp in Boston this summer! Girls and boys, ages 10-18 will receive high-quality training from Emmanuel College Head Volleyball Coach, Bori May, and his dedicated staff. Athletes from Suffolk County and beyond will have the opportunity to sharpen their fundamentals of the game with instruction and drills in a fun and competitive environment. We welcome players of all abilities to join the fun, compete with other athletes, and prepare for the upcoming volleyball season!

name: Nike Volleyball Camp at Community Wellness Center with Volleyball Elite Training - All Skills Camp (June 29–July 2, 2026)
description: Come elevate your game with the Volleyball Elite Training coaches and get the opportunity to be coached by LOVB Atlanta and Atlanta Vibe players! Our volleyball camp offers a fun and competitive environment where athletes will receive personalized coaching, improve their techniques, and engage in team-building activities. We will focus on developing key skills such as serving, passing, setting, hitting, blocking, and defensive strategies.

name: Nike Volleyball Camp at Bryant Junior High School - Serving Clinic (May 26, 2026)

Our camp at Bryant High School is designed for girls, ages 8-17, who want to sharpen their skills and build confidence on the court. name: Nike Volleyball Camp at Johnson & Wales University - Bonus Position Specialty Clinics (July 13–15, 2026)
description: Get ready to have a blast at our volleyball camp at Johnson & Wales University! Designed for girls ages 10-18, these summer sessions provide top-tier training led by Head Volleyball Coach Michael Houlihan and his experienced coaching staff. Players of all skill levels will sharpen their techniques through dynamic drills, competitive play, and hands-on instruction. Join the fun and boost your volleyball game in Rhode Island!HONORABLE MENTION IN THE 2025 TOP 10 NIKE VOLLEYBALL CAMPS. The Top-Rated Camp & Director Awards recognize and celebrate directors who deliver exceptional, BEST-IN-CLASS experiences for both campers and parents. Winners are determined through a detailed analysis of thousands of post-camp parent reviews, with the goal of amplifying positive word-of-mouth, boosting camp enrollment, and reinforcing parents’ confidence that their investment was worthwhile.
